channel.title: Pro Tools Arranger
channel.description: Automatic updates for Pro Tools Arranger — the Arranger lane for Pro Tools.

item.title: Version 0.8.5
item.description:
• Fixed the narrow Pro Tools-sidebar dock width: every toolbar and transport control now stays reachable — anything that doesn't fit tucks into a "•••" menu, so nothing is ever cut off the edge at any width.
  • Fixed reconnecting after Disconnect — the connection now tears down cleanly and reconnects reliably, with a visible Reconnect button right on the disconnected screen.
  • Carries forward always-on auto-update checks and all the Ableton-style quantized section launch, auto-connect, and Key-chain features.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.8.4
item.description:
• Everything fits at dock width — the Arranger stays readable when snapped to the narrow Pro Tools sidebar.
  • Section markers now show their bar locations, and the drag indicator is brighter and easier to track.
  • Carries forward always-on auto-update checks and all the Ableton-style quantized section launch, auto-connect, and Key-chain features.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.8.3
item.description:
• Pro Tools Arranger now checks for updates automatically — on launch and hourly — so you always know when there's a new version. It prompts you; it never installs anything on its own.
  • Keeps the focused narrow-window default from 0.8.2 and all the Ableton-style quantized section launch, auto-connect, and Key-chain features.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.8.2
item.description:
• The Arranger now opens as a focused, narrow window by default — no more reaching for the edge to resize it down.
  • Carries forward Ableton-style quantized section launch, auto-connect, and Key-chain.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.8.1
item.description:
• Ableton-style quantized section launch — sections fire on the bar, with loop + playback hardening.
  • Plugged a temp-dir and bounced-WAV leak in Detect Key/BPM.
  • Cleaner thin-dock header — no more cramped wordmark when docked to the Pro Tools sidebar.
  • Auto-connect and Key-chain from 0.7.7 intact (no Connect button; key written into Pro Tools, bgate-matched to Vault).
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.7.7
item.description:
• Auto-connect — no Connect button. Pro Tools is detected automatically.
  • Key-chain — bgate key detection matching Vault, drops a Key marker at bar 1.
  • Marker and Auto-Key groundwork.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.7.6
item.description:
• Marker colors now match Pro Tools exactly.
  • Fixed Detect-Key bounce so key detection lands reliably.
  • Hidden tracks are restored and respected.
  • New "Keep in Front of Pro Tools" toggle keeps the Arranger window pinned over your session.
  • New "Dock to Pro Tools Sidebar" — snap the Arranger to the side of your Pro Tools window.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.7.5
item.description:
• Live Pro Tools auto-sync — the arrangement tracks your session in real time.
  • Removed the separate "Build Sections" button — sections build automatically.
  • Fixed Duplicate-3 (third duplicate now lands correctly).
  • Marker color is kept when sections move or duplicate.
  • Resizable window.
  • In-window updates (no separate update window).
  • Native window-tabbing support.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).

item.title: Version 0.7.4
item.description:
• New: "Check for Updates…" in the app menu (Sparkle auto-update, EdDSA-verified, opt-in — never installs silently).
  • The red neon "TR" maker's mark now sits on the app icon.
  • All v0.7.3 arranger features intact: tempo map, meter map, section build, and marker moves.
  • Notarized Developer ID build (Capiscana, Inc.).
